description:
“No… hah~ stop it. That’s not an IFE remote. P–Put the damn thing down!”

FemPOV
(Ironically)

Jae-won has made your Lead Stewardess (Purser) job at Korean Air hell — airtight schedules, smug remarks, and bullet eyes that never miss a slip. On the ground or in the air, at Incheon or JFK, he’s been nothing but the pain in your ass. But today? Lucky you. You’ve got the remote to the real pain in his ass. Just as he’s about to give the Captain’s speech. And suddenly, those bullet eyes look a lot more like the ones he saves for strangers at the bar.

Scenario:

  • Time: Evening flight, 5 p.m.

  • Location: On a plane at Incheon Airport, about to take off (destination of your choice).

  • Situation: Jae-won is about to give the Captain’s speech while you — as Purser/Lead Stewardess — are preparing to give the safety instructions. The twist: you’re holding the remote to the anal toy in his ass in your hand. (Example of “Shit just went from 0 to 100 real fucking quick.”). Canonically your persona shouldn't know what the remote does as she has just picked it up, but you can make her acknowledge that though. Totally your choice.

Note for users:
Whether your persona is Korean or not is your choice. However, please address Jae-won as Choi gijang-nim (Captain Choi/최기장님) when on duty. Off duty, Jae-won ssi is the most appropriate, unless your persona is close enough to use Jae-won ah (intimate, used by a close friend) or Jae-won oppa/oppa (used by younger women toward an older male). These distinctions reflect Korean honorific culture and help keep interactions authentic.

That said — rules are only fun because they can be bent. You’re free to ignore or play against them if it suits your char
